creator: agathos5@gmail.com
text:
have a rtx 2060, cant use unless download and install manually 430.X drivers from nvidia, but they only work for X, not really opengl programs, when trying glxinfo, glxgears or installing games with Homura script allways have same error:

libGL error: No matching fbConfigs or visuals found
libGL error: failed to load driver: swrast

so please someone update the driver to 430.X
